domain: Mongolian Naadam (Mongolian summer festival 'three games of men' — eriin gurvan naadam — wrestling + archery + horse-racing; per-event eligibility gate by gender + age; archery sub-style routing Khalkh/Buriad/Uriankhai; horse-racing 5-13 year-old jockeys; compound participation across multiple events)
specific_mechanism: NAADAM-MULTI-GATE: K-route multi-criteria eligibility-gate with per-route sub-style routing. (1) Define K event-routes (factual / ethical / code / creative / retrieval-grounded / dialog) — K=6. (2) Per-route multi-criteria gate g_k(x) = conj(intent_classifier_k(x), content_classifier_k(x), format_classifier_k(x), safety_flag_k(x)). (3) Sub-style routing within each route: top-3 sub-attention heads matched by Khalkh/Buriad/Uriankhai-style scoring. (4) Compound input: same input can satisfy multiple gates simultaneously → mixture-of-route output via convex mix π_k(x). (5) Gate trained via supervised intent-labeled corpus + small distilled classifier per route.
llm_application: NAADAM-MULTI-GATE for LLM input routing + multi-criteria gating. Differs from Gated Attention NeurIPS 2025 (head-specific sigmoid gate after SDPA — different — single-head gate not multi-criteria K-route eligibility). MasRouter (learning-based routing for multi-agent — different — agent-level routing not within-attention head-level gating). Cost-Aware LLM Routing NadirClaw (cost-aware routing + prompt classification — closest, but no per-route sub-style top-K-head matching + compound mixture). Visual Guide Attention Variants (catalog of attention variants — overview). Differs from R435 BHUTANESE-GHO (binary classifier untouchable), R444 SAMOAN-FALE (3-tier elevation mask), R412 BEDOUIN-MAJLIS (council deliberation), R397 BERBER-TIFINAGH (script-pattern), R461 KHIPU-GATE (bit-encoded category-cord layer-wise gate) by EXPLICIT MULTI-CRITERIA K-ROUTE ELIGIBILITY GATE + PER-ROUTE SUB-STYLE TOP-K-HEAD + COMPOUND MIXTURE-OF-ROUTE.
novelty_claim: Gated Attention + MasRouter + Cost-Aware Routing + Visual Variants cover gated routing paradigm. NAADAM-MULTI-GATE adds (a) K-route multi-criteria conjunctive eligibility gate + (b) per-route sub-style top-K-head matching + (c) compound-input mixture-of-route convex output. Recombination — gated routing + classifier are mainstream.
